name: Toguz Kumalak
author: AGP
description: Toguz Kumalak (Kazakh 'nine pebbles'), the Central Asian sowing mancala. Two rows of nine pits (otau) and two kazans (stores), 162 balls total, 9 per pit. Sow counterclockwise leaving one behind; capture an opponent pit made even; claim a 'tuzdik' sacred hole by making an opponent pit total three. First to more than 81 balls wins.
